steps.title: Find the greatest common factor
steps.content: The coefficients 30 and 42 share a common factor. Notice that $30 = 6 \cdot 5$ and $42 = 6 \cdot 7$, so their GCD is 6.

steps.title: Factor and match to a choice
steps.content: Factor 6 from both terms of the original expression:$$30x + 42 = 6 \cdot 5x + 6 \cdot 7 = 6(5x + 7)$$That matches choice D — D is correct.
